assets.title: A more complicated org. chart
tags: You can make many charts look more elegant by using circles or curved rectangles. You should consider the text that is going to fit within the shape— some text doesn’t naturally or easily fit into a circle. Another thing to consider, if in a larger document what type of shapes are used elsewhere. If one page uses circles, one page rounded rectangles and another, squares the document is going feel like it was assembled but many different hands, not all of a piece with one voice.
